name: jaaql-middleware-python

metadata.name: jaaql-middleware-python
metadata.license: Mozilla Public License Version 2.0 with Commons Clause
metadata.summary: The jaaql package, allowing for rapid development and deployment of RESTful HTTP applications

documentation:
# JAAQL-middleware-python
Please navigate to docker/docker.md to see setup instructions  

The project can be deployed alone to function as a database portal or extended as shown in the example app located at https://github.com/JAAQL/JAAQL-example-app  

When locally developing it is recommended to use the associated postgres local instance as JAAQL performs some none reversible changes to the database and it is just easier to use a new database

variables.name: jaaql.utilities.crypt_utils.AES__key_length
documentation: A key of length 24 that is base64 encoded is length 32. This corresponds to AES-256

variables.name: jaaql.utilities.crypt_utils.AES__iv_length_b64
documentation: A iv of length 12 will be base64 encoded (url safe) to be length 16

variables.name: jaaql.openapi.swagger_documentation.CONTENT_TYPE__json
documentation: This isn't a python constant so it is defined here

variables.name: jaaql.openapi.swagger_documentation.DOCUMENTATION__allow_all
documentation: Set as the name to allow all input/output

methods.name: jaaql.mvc.base_model.BaseJAAQLModel.exit_jaaql
documentation:
Will terminate the worker forcefully which fires a hook in gunicorn_config.py
This hook reloads all workers if the file exists in vault
:return:

functions.name: jaaql.mvc.base_controller.json_serial
documentation: JSON serializer for objects not serializable by default json code

methods.name: jaaql.mvc.base_controller.BaseJAAQLController.bi_cast
documentation:
Attempt to cast a response to it's intended type. Then check equality when casting back. If this can happen e.g.
'5' can be cast to 5 and then back to '5' it's considered equal and the cast is performed
:return:

methods.name: jaaql.mvc.base_controller.BaseJAAQLController.log_safe_dump
documentation:
Performs a log safe json dump of the data
:return:

methods.name: jaaql.mvc.model.JAAQLModel.parse_gdesc_output
documentation: Parse the output of \gdesc to extract column names and types.

methods.name: jaaql.mvc.model.JAAQLModel.cron_expression_to_string
documentation: Converts a CronExpression object into a cron expression string.
